column2: CAA Case Officer Reviews Operational Authorisation Pack
column3: ["The CAA case officer accesses the applicant's OA pack. ", 'The CAA case officer reviews the OA pack according to the compliance checklist. ', 'If the OA pack is complete, a valid case can be opened by the CAA case officer. ']
column4: ['The CAA case officer is able to view and interact with the OA pack. ', 'The CAA case officer confirms that all required information in the OA pack matches the compliance checklist. ', 'The CAA case officer creates and saves a new case record for further processing. ']
